stops.name: İstanbul
stops.note: Fly out of the city on the strait, bound for the Anatolian plateau.

stops.name: Kayseri
stops.note: Land under Mount Erciyes and head west into the tuff country.

stops.name: Göreme
stops.note: Drift over the fairy chimneys of Cappadocia at first light.

stops.name: Kuşadası
stops.note: Motor down to the Aegean coast and its harbour.

stops.name: Ephesus
stops.note: Walk the marble street to the Library of Celsus.
